products.name: Gold Kundan Necklace
products.description: An exquisite Kundan necklace handcrafted by skilled artisans, featuring traditional meenakari work and polki diamonds set in 22K gold plating. Perfect for bridal ceremonies and festive occasions.
details: Care: Store in a dry place, avoid perfume contact

products.name: Emerald Polki Choker Set
products.description: A regal emerald and polki diamond choker set inspired by Mughal-era jewellery. Includes matching earrings and maang tikka. A statement piece for royal occasions.
details: Material: Sterling Silver with Gold Polish

products.name: Pearl Drop Jhumka Earrings
products.description: Delicate pearl drop jhumka earrings with intricate filigree work. Lightweight yet luxurious, these earrings transition seamlessly from day to night.

products.name: Ruby Studded Bangles Set
products.description: A stunning set of 6 gold-plated bangles adorned with natural ruby stones. The rich red of the rubies against gleaming gold creates an irresistible classic Indian jewellery look.

products.name: Diamond Maang Tikka
products.description: An elegant diamond maang tikka with a floral motif, set in white gold. The centrepiece features a marquise-cut diamond surrounded by smaller brilliant-cut stones.

products.name: Antique Gold Waistband
products.description: A magnificent antique-finish gold waistband (kamarbandh) crafted in the traditional manner, featuring elaborate floral and paisley motifs. A must-have bridal accessory.

products.name: Kundan Nath (Nose Ring)
products.description: A traditional Kundan nath adorned with pearls and rubies, a bridal jewellery staple across Rajasthan and Punjab. The intricate kundan setting gives it a royal appearance.

products.name: Silver Ghungroo Anklet Pair
products.description: Sterling silver ghungroo payal (anklets) with delicate bells that chime with every step. Pair sold together. A timeless Indian accessory for all occasions.

collections.name: Bridal Luxe
collections.description: Opulent jewellery crafted for your most cherished moments. Every piece tells a story of love and tradition.

collections.name: Heritage
collections.description: Timeless designs inspired by India's rich jewellery-making legacy, reimagined for the modern woman.

collections.name: Everyday Minimal
collections.description: Refined pieces to elevate every day. Effortlessly luxurious for the woman who appreciates beauty in simplicity.
